title: Bulk change inheritance
author: ptahbe
body_snippet:
## Expected Behavior
For some reason the inheritance changed on all the connections I have configured. I would like to be able to change change this for multiple connections in one go.

## Current Behavior
Now I have to click on a connection and select inherit all for each connection.

## Possible Solution
Enable bulk edit of inheritance (and other settings)

## Your Environment
<!--- Include as many relevant details about the environment you experienced the bug in -->
* Version used:...

iterations.description: Issue has no body/description and no reproducible steps - only triage refresh comments requesting more information about what 'bulk change inheritance' means and what the expected vs actual behavior is.
Wontfix: Bulk edit inheritance on multi-select requires undo/redo support to prevent accidental mass changes

notes: Feature: bulk change inheritance on multiple connections. Requires tree multi-select + batch edit UI.
